mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fruits (vendor_id, name, price, unit, status, description, view_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{vendorId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{unit}, #{status}, #{description}, #{viewCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE fruits SET name = #{name}, price = #{price}, unit = #{unit}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE fruits SET view_count = #{viewCount} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fruits WHERE vendor_id = #{vendorId} AND status <> 'DELETED' ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM fruits WHERE status IN ('ON_SALE', 'LIMITED') AND (#{vendorId} IS NULL OR vendor_id = #{vendorId}) ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT f.* FROM fruits f INNER JOIN fruit_tags ft ON f.id = ft.fruit_id WHERE f.status IN ('ON_SALE', 'LIMITED') AND (#{vendorId} IS NULL OR f.vendor_id = #{vendorId}) AND ft.tag = #{tag} ORDER BY f.updated_at DESC
